arts.ttl: Lens near agreement to sign former Arsenal and Brighton goalkeeper Mathew Ryan
arts.sum: Lens are nearing an agreement to sign Australia international goalkeeper Mathew Ryan (32), according to a report from L’Equipe. Will Still’s Artois side were in the market for a goalkeeper…

arts.ttl: Matthijs de Ligt issues Manchester United demand - 'This is what we need'
arts.sum: Manchester United produced 80-plus minutes of relative dross against Southampton before being saved by Amad's stunning hat-trick, now big-money Dutch defender Matthijs de Ligt wants the side to kick on - starting at Old Trafford against Brighton

arts.ttl: Matthijs de Ligt makes feelings clear on just how big a club Man Utd currently are
arts.sum: Dutch defender Matthijs de Ligt has played for European giants Ajax, Juventus and Bayern Munich, and joined Manchester United from the German giants in the summer

arts.ttl: How Old Trafford mourned Denis Law: IAN HERBERT on a sombre 24 hours as Man United fans honoured the final link to the club's glorious past
arts.sum: IAN HERBERT: A shining star ornament placed at Denis Law's right boot on Manchester United's Holy Trinity statue gave out a frail light and people arrived with bouquets to provide some colour

arts.ttl: Former Brighton winger set to swap Anderlecht for MLS side San Diego
arts.sum: Het Nieuwsblad are reporting that Anderlecht winger Anders Dreyer is set for a move to the MLS. According to the paper, the Danish winger will join San Diego for a…

arts.ttl: Man Utd receive improved Antony bid from Real Betis
arts.sum: Antony is free to leave Manchester United this month providing the terms of a loan deal are amenable to the Red Devils.

arts.ttl: Barcelona in 'transfer war' over Man Utd outcast Rashford
arts.sum: Barcelona are embroiled in a 'transfer war' with Borussia Dortmund over Marcus Rashford, according to Spanish media. Barcelona in 'transfer war' over Man Utd outcast Rashford

arts.ttl: Former Manchester United star highlights why Jude Bellingham would reject Premier League move
arts.sum: Jude Bellingham has developed into a crucial player at Real Madrid in an incredible first 18 months in Spain. Bellingham was named as the La Liga Player of the Season in his debut 2023/24 campaign with with an incredible 19 goals scored from midfield.
